fileContext.overview: OllamaProvider connects to a locally-running Ollama instance using its native NDJSON streaming API.

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Generate text based on user input.
symbols.behavior: Makes a POST request to the Ollama API with the user input and returns the generated text.
symbols.parameters: messages: LLMMessage[], maxTokens: number, signal?: AbortSignal
symbols.limitations: Requires a locally-running Ollama instance and may be rate-limited.
